title: LIP01 - Lead: Badge
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%">
    <gds-list>
        <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable>
            <gds-badge slot="lead" variant="information">Status</gds-badge>
            <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Selectable list item with lead badge</gds-text>
        </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
    </gds-list>
</gds-div>
